form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[归集单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] totalAmount[合计金额] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] =========>lines[明细行]====== lines[明细行](2) ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[归集单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] totalAmount[合计金额] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] =========>lines[明细行]====== lines[明细行](2) remark[备注](2)
